summary: E-commerce application with product management, pricing in Indian Rupees, food product categorization, and delivery/takeaway options
architectural_notes: Product pricing system uses Indian Rupees (INR) as currency
Delivery system supports two options: 1-hour delivery and takeaway

existing_features.title: Change the price display and input from USD to Indian Rupees (INR) throughout the application. Update all price labels to show '₹' symbol or 'INR' instead of 'USD'. This includes ProductCard, ProductDetail, CartItem, ShoppingCart order summary, OrderConfirmation, and the CreateProduct form.
Add 'Food' as a new product category option. This category should appear in the category dropdown when creating products and in the category filter navigation on the product catalog page.

Add a delivery type field to products with two options: '1-hour delivery' and 'Takeaway'. Include this field in the product creation form, product data model in the backend, and display it on product cards and detail pages.

new_feature_requests.summary: Change price currency from USD to Indian Rupees (INR)
Add delivery type options: 1-hour delivery or takeaway
